title: melica nitens
intro: Melica nitens, also known as Yellow Bent or Golden Bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Melica nitens include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Melica nitens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
